popularStory.headline: History of Hugh de Courtenay (1251-1391)
popularStory.description: Sir Hugh de Courtenay (1251–1292) was the son and heir of John de Courtenay, feudal baron of Okehampton, Devon, by Isabel de Vere, daughter of Hugh de Vere, 4th Earl of Oxford. His son inherited the e …

zh.Okehampton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓
zh.Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Courtenay I於1249年3月25日出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓時，他的父親Sir John de Courtenay24歲，母親Isabel de Vere14歲。他於大約1271年與Eleanor Despencer在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年2月28日在英國英格蘭戴文享年42歲，埋葬在英國戴文考維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Courtenay I于1249年3月25日出生在英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Courtenay24岁，母亲Isabel de Vere14岁。他于大约1271年与Eleanor Despencer在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1292年2月28日在英国英格兰戴文享年42岁，埋葬在英国戴文考維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Courtenay I was born on 25 March 1249, in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Courtenay, was 24 and his mother, Isabel de Vere, was 14. He married Eleanor Despencer about 1271, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 28 February 1292, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Cowick, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Courtenay I est né le 25 mars 1249, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Courtenay, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Vere, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Despencer environ 1271, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 28 février 1292, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Cowick, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Courtenay I am 25. März 1249 in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Courtenay 24 und seine Mutter Isabel de Vere 14. Er hat um 1271 in Devon, England Eleanor Despencer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Februar 1292 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cowick, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Courtenay I è nato il il 25 marzo 1249 nel Okehampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Courtenay, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Vere, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Despencer circa 1271, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1292, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Cowick, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Courtenay Iが1249年3月25日にイギリスイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Courtenayは24歳，母Isabel de Vereは14歳であった。約1271年にイギリスデボンでEleanor Despencerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年2月28日にイギリスイギリスデボンで42歳で死去し，イギリスデボンコウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Courtenay I(이)가 1249년 3월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Courtenay(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Vere(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1271년 영국 데폰에서 Eleanor Despencer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 2월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 코윅에 묻혔다.

pt.25 March 1249–28 February 1292: 25 de março de 1249–28 de fevereiro de 1292
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Courtenay I nasceu em 25 de março de 1249, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Courtenay, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Vere, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Despencer aproximadamente 1271, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1292, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Cowick, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Courtenay I родился 25 марта 1249 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Courtenay было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Vere, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Despencer около 1271 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 28 февраля 1292 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности коуикк, девон, Англия.

es.25 March 1249–28 February 1292: 25 de marzo de 1249–28 de febrero de 1292
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Courtenay I nació el 25 de marzo de 1249, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Courtenay, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel de Vere, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Eleanor Despencer aproximadamente 1271, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1292, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Cowick, Devon, Inglaterra.
